title: Ayutthaya、Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Ayutthaya、Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Ayutthaya是Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya的一個城市，人口約80,000。A UNESCO World Heritage city just north of Bangkok, rich in history with ancient temple ruins, and offering a much more affordable lifestyle than the capital.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
